emails.subject: 3:00 meeting today
emails.body: 3:00 meeting today Please note there will be a meeting at 3:00 today in Danny's office regarding the floor plan. We hope that everyone can accommodate their schedules to attend the meeting. If you have any questions, please call Julie at x33597. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: 3:00 meeting today
emails.body: RE: 3:00 meeting today Julie, it looks like a slip of the finger on Roger Hayes vs. Robert Hayes. FYI, K.

emails.subject: RE: 3:00 meeting today
emails.body: Just call me speedy ala Jules. Moving to fast. Thanks.
